en.title: Best Noise Cancelling Headphones 2026
en.description: Tracks the top over-ear noise cancelling headphones for commuters, travelers, and work-from-home users.

zh-tw.title: 最佳降噪耳罩式耳機 2026
zh-tw.description: 追蹤通勤者、旅行者和居家工作者的頂級耳罩式降噪耳機排行榜。

en.description: Sony's flagship ANC headphones with the QN3 chip, offering class-leading noise cancellation, LDAC support, and a redesigned foldable frame.

zh-tw.description: 搭載 QN3 晶片的 Sony 旗艦降噪耳機，以 87% 平均噪音降幅奪下全品類第一，支援 LDAC 高解析音訊，可折疊設計比前代更緊湊，是 2026 年最完整的 ANC 耳機。

en.description: Bose's premium flagship with ActiveSense ANC that dynamically adjusts to surroundings and Immersive Audio spatial sound mode.

zh-tw.description: Bose 旗艦款，ActiveSense 技術依環境即時動態調節降噪強度，在機場和建築工地等突發噪音場景中反應最快，搭配 Immersive Audio 空間音效模式。

en.description: Audiophile-grade sound with adaptive ANC and an industry-leading 60-hour battery life at a mid-range price.

zh-tw.description: 全品類最長的 60 小時 ANC 電池壽命，搭配發燒友級音質與自適應降噪，$349 的售價讓重度旅行者從此擺脫充電焦慮，是長途出行者的首選。

en.description: Apple's premium over-ear headphones with H2 chip, Adaptive Audio, lossless audio via USB-C, and deep Apple ecosystem integration.

zh-tw.description: 搭載 H2 晶片的 Apple 高端耳罩式耳機，音質評分 9.3 居前四名之冠，USB-C 無損音訊與 Adaptive Audio 自適應模式，是 Apple 用戶追求極致音質的唯一正確選擇。

en.description: Budget ANC headphones with rare LDAC support and 50-hour battery that punch far above their price point.

zh-tw.description: $100 以內唯一支援 LDAC 的 ANC 耳機，50 小時電池在全榜最長，自適應降噪讓所有 $200 競品的存在都顯得尷尬，是預算族群最正確的選擇。

en.description: Sony's lightest ANC headphone at 192g, offering solid noise cancellation and 35-hour battery for budget-conscious buyers.

zh-tw.description: Sony 最輕 ANC 耳機，僅 192 克，35 小時電池搭配扎實的降噪表現，是預算有限又需要每日通勤使用的買家的最佳入門選擇。

en.description: Luxury over-ear headphones with Carbon Cone drivers and Nappa leather construction, targeting audiophiles who demand premium materials.

zh-tw.description: Nappa 皮革搭配碳纖維振膜的奢華耳機，音質評分 9.5 居全榜之冠，是明確以音質優先、可接受降噪表現居次的發燒友唯一值得考慮的選擇。

en.description: A beloved Bose classic with TriPort acoustic architecture and exceptional comfort, now available at a discounted legacy price.

zh-tw.description: Bose 經典款，TriPort 聲學架構搭配業界最舒適的耳墊，現以折扣售價販售，是追求 Bose 舒適感而不願付旗艦溢價的買家的最佳選擇。

en.description: Enterprise-focused headset with a 10-microphone array, best-in-class call quality, and 37-hour battery for all-day meetings.

zh-tw.description: 企業級耳機首選，10 支麥克風陣列帶來全品類最佳通話清晰度，37 小時電池讓全天視訊會議從容應對，是遠距工作者最值得投資的耳機。

en.description: Teams-certified headset with a 13-level ANC dial and dedicated Teams button, built for Microsoft 365 enterprise workflows.

zh-tw.description: Teams 認證耳機，13 段 ANC 旋鈕與專屬 Teams 快捷鍵，專為 Microsoft 365 企業工作流程深度優化，是深度依賴 Teams 的辦公族最自然的選擇。

en.commentary: The Sony WH-1000XM6 is the best noise-cancelling headphone I've tested in 2026, and the margin of victory is larger than the scores suggest. The QN3 chip, seven times faster than its predecessor, processes ANC feedback so rapidly that the noise floor feels like it drops immediately rather than gradually. Sony's claim of class-leading noise cancellation is validated by RTINGS, Wirecutter, Tom's Guide, and every independent lab that has tested it. LDAC support means you get wireless convenience without sacrificing audio quality. The redesigned foldable frame is more compact than the XM5 and feels noticeably more premium. At a street price of $319–$399, it's the most complete headphone you can buy regardless of price. The Bose QuietComfort Ultra at #2 is the only headphone that meaningfully threatens the XM6's ANC performance. Bose's ActiveSense technology, which dynamically adjusts noise cancellation based on the acoustic environment, handles sudden noise spikes better than any competing technology. Some reviewers give the QCU a narrow ANC edge for unpredictable environments like airports. I respect that assessment while maintaining the XM6's #1 position because Sony's combination of ANC + LDAC + battery + price creates a more complete package. The Sennheiser Momentum 4 at #3 deserves special recognition for a single achievement: 60 hours of ANC battery life. That figure stands alone: every other headphone in this category trails significantly. If you travel frequently and hate charging, the Momentum 4 will survive a long-haul flight, a layover, and a full working day on a single charge. The Bowers & Wilkins Px8 has the highest sound quality score in this entire ranking, 9.5, and still ranks #7. That tells you everything about the trade-off: at $699 with average ANC, it's the headphone for audiophiles who prioritize how music sounds over how much noise it blocks.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 Is the Best ANC Headphone Ever Made, and the QN3 Chip Changes Everything
highlights.body: The QN3 chip's 7x processing speed improvement over the previous generation means ANC feedback loops are processed before your brain perceives the noise. In practice, this translates to a noise floor that feels absolute — truly eliminated rather than merely reduced. Combined with LDAC for hi-res audio wirelessly and a redesigned frame that's genuinely more comfortable than the XM5, the WH-1000XM6 earns its #1 position by being measurably ahead in every category that matters.

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Is the Right Choice If You're in Loud, Unpredictable Environments
highlights.body: ActiveSense's real-time dynamic adjustment of noise cancellation is Bose's ace card. In environments with sudden noise spikes, an airport gate, a construction site, a busy open-plan office, the QCU adapts faster than any competing ANC algorithm. Some independent reviewers give it a narrow edge over the XM6 for these scenarios specifically. If your primary environment is chaotic rather than consistently loud, the QCU's dynamic approach may serve you better than Sony's more static optimization.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4's 60-Hour Battery Is the Most Underappreciated Feature in This Category
highlights.body: Every other headphone at this price tier offers 20–30 hours of ANC battery. Sennheiser delivers 60. That's a generational leap: it means you can use the Momentum 4 for an entire long-haul flight, a multi-day conference, or a full workweek without reaching for a cable. The ANC quality (8.2) is competent rather than class-leading, but for frequent travelers who prioritize always having power, the Momentum 4 stands alone under $350 as the strongest choice.

highlights.title: Apple AirPods Max at #4 Is the Best Option for Apple Users Who Demand Top Sound Quality
highlights.body: The AirPods Max's H2 chip delivers the best sound quality score among the top 4 headphones at 9.3. Adaptive Audio, lossless audio via USB-C, and the deep Apple ecosystem integration create a listening experience that all Android-compatible headphones fall short of replicating for iPhone users. The 20-hour battery and $549 price are real constraints to weigh, but for Apple ecosystem users who put sound quality first, the AirPods Max is the correct choice and the cost is justified.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space Q45 at $100 Is the Most Embarrassingly Good Value in This Entire Category
highlights.body: LDAC support, a feature that should be gatekept to $300+ headphones, combined with adaptive ANC, 50-hour battery, and a foldable design for $100 is the most aggressively priced value proposition I've seen in consumer audio. The sound quality (7.5) and comfort (7.5) sit below the premium options, but for a secondary headphone, a student purchase, or anyone with a strict budget, the Space Q45 makes every $200 headphone look like a bad deal. RTINGS confirms it as their top budget ANC pick, and I agree without reservation.

zh-tw.commentary: Sony WH-1000XM6 是我在 2026 年測試過的最好的降噪耳機，勝出的差距比評分所顯示的還要大。QN3 晶片，比其前身快七倍，處理 ANC 反饋的速度如此之快，以至於噪音底板感覺是立即降低的，而非漸進發生。Sony 的行業頂尖降噪聲稱已由 RTINGS、Wirecutter、Tom's Guide 和每個獨立實驗室驗證。LDAC 支援意味著你可以享有無線便利的同時維持完整音質。重新設計的可折疊框架比 XM5 更緊湊，感覺更高端。以 $319-$399 的街頭售價，它是你無論價格如何都能購買的最完整耳機。Bose QuietComfort Ultra 排名第 2 是唯一有意義威脅 XM6 降噪性能的耳機。Sennheiser Momentum 4 排名第 3 因單一成就值得特別認可：60 小時的 ANC 電池壽命。這個數字在這個類別中獨樹一幟，所有其他耳機都遠落後於此。Soundcore Space Q45 以 $100 提供 LDAC 和自適應 ANC，是整個品類最令人汗顏的性價比。Bowers & Wilkins Px8 擁有整個排名中最高的音質評分，9.5，卻仍然排名第 7。這告訴你一切關於取捨的信息：$699 加上一般的 ANC，它是優先考慮音樂聽起來如何而不是阻擋多少噪音的音響玩家的耳機。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 是有史以來最好的 ANC 耳機，QN3 晶片改變了一切
highlights.body: QN3 晶片比上一代 7 倍的處理速度意味著 ANC 反饋循環在你的大腦感知噪音之前就已被處理。在實踐中，這轉化為一個感覺絕對的噪音底板——真正被消除，而非僅僅減弱。結合無線 LDAC 高解析音訊和真正比 XM5 更舒適的重新設計框架，WH-1000XM6 憑藉在每個重要類別中可測量地領先競爭對手，贏得其第 1 名的地位。

highlights.title: Bose QuietComfort Ultra 是你處於嘈雜、不可預測環境的正確選擇
highlights.body: ActiveSense 對降噪的實時動態調整是 Bose 的王牌。在有突發噪音峰值的環境中，機場登機口、建築工地、繁忙的開放式辦公室，QCU 的適應速度比任何競爭的 ANC 算法都快。一些獨立評測者在這些特定場景中給它比 XM6 略微的優勢。如果你的主要環境以混亂突發噪音為主而非持續穩定的背景噪音，QCU 的動態方法可能比 Sony 更廣頻優化的方式更好地服務你。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 的 60 小時電池是這個品類中最被低估的功能
highlights.body: 這個價位的每款其他耳機提供 20-30 小時的 ANC 電池。Sennheiser 提供 60 小時，是真正世代性的躍進。這意味著你可以在整個長途飛行、多天會議或整整一週工作中使用 Momentum 4 而無需拿起充電線。ANC 品質（8.2）稱職而非行業領先，但對於優先考慮永遠保有電力的頻繁旅行者，$350 以下所有耳機中 Momentum 4 的論據最為強大。

highlights.title: Apple AirPods Max 排名第 4，是拒絕在音質上妥協的 Apple 用戶最佳選擇
highlights.body: AirPods Max 的 H2 晶片以 9.3 的評分提供前四款耳機中最高的音質評分。Adaptive Audio、USB-C 無損音訊，以及深度 Apple 生態系整合為 iPhone 用戶創造了所有 Android 兼容耳機都難以企及的聆聽體驗。20 小時電池和 $549 售價是需要衡量的現實條件，但對 Apple 生態系用戶且以音質為優先考慮的人，AirPods Max 是正確的選擇，費用合理。

highlights.title: Soundcore Space Q45 以 $100 是整個品類最令人汗顏的性價比
highlights.body: LDAC 支援，一個通常被把關在 $300 以上耳機的功能，結合自適應 ANC、50 小時電池和可折疊設計，以 $100 是我在消費者音訊中見過的最激進的定價主張。音質（7.5）和舒適度（7.5）與高端選項相比仍有差距，但對於備用耳機、學生購買或任何預算嚴格的人，Space Q45 讓每款 $200 的耳機看起來都像是壞買賣。RTINGS 確認它為其頂級預算 ANC 選擇，我毫不保留地同意。

references.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QuietComfort Ultra 2: Which flagship wins? — Tom's Guide
Sony WH-1000XM6 vs Bose QC Ultra (2nd Gen) — What Hi-Fi?

en.commentary:
The noise-cancelling headphone debate in 2026 has a definitive answer: Sony WH-1000XM6 is the best ANC headphone ever made, and the lead is substantial. Tom's Guide's six-month comparison against the Bose QCU 2nd Gen produced a clear winner, and What Hi-Fi?'s measurements confirmed Sony's QN3 chip reduces average loudness by 87%, three percentage points ahead of Bose's 84%. In the context of ANC headphones, three points is the difference between 'great' and 'the best.'

Bose QuietComfort Ultra (2nd Gen) holds #2 and earns its place fully: Bose's perceived ANC intensity still feels stronger to some users despite Sony's superior measurements. This is a legitimate psychological reality: Bose tuned their ANC profile to prioritize low-frequency noise (aircraft engines, HVAC systems) that feels most oppressive to travelers. Sony spread their ANC more evenly across frequencies. If your use case is airline travel specifically, Bose might still feel better to you.

Sennheiser Momentum 4 at #3 is the audiophile pick and the battery life champion. 60 hours of battery life is in a different category than Sony's 30 hours or Bose's 24 hours, it means two international flights and three recharging cycles between flights versus six recharging cycles. For heavy travelers, Sennheiser's battery advantage is decisive.

The Soundcore Space Q45 at #5 continues to be the most underrated budget option in audio. $100 for LDAC support, 50-hour battery, and effective ANC was out of reach in 2024. It is standard in 2026. Chinese audio manufacturers have closed the gap substantially.

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 Is the Best ANC Headphone Ever Made, with Six-Month Real-World Testing Confirming Its Lead
highlights.body: Tom's Guide's extended comparison is the most rigorous we've seen for ANC headphones: six months of daily use across plane flights, subway commutes, coffee shops, and open-plan offices. Sony's QN3 chip wins on measured noise reduction (87% average loudness reduction vs Bose's 84%), LDAC audio quality, multipoint connectivity, and battery life at 30 hours. Bose wins on perceived comfort for some ear shapes and arguably better tuning for airline frequencies. On balance, Sony wins the overall comparison decisively. If you're buying one premium ANC headphone in 2026, WH-1000XM6 is the correct choice.

highlights.title: Bose QCU 2nd Gen Is the Better Choice for Airline Travel, and Psychology Matters When It Makes Your Flight More Comfortable
highlights.body: Here is the uncomfortable truth: Bose's ANC profile feels more effective to many users on airplanes even though Sony's measured performance is superior. The reason is tuning philosophy. Bose prioritizes the 100-400Hz range where aircraft engine drone lives. Sony's QN3 chip attacks a broader frequency spectrum more evenly. If you primarily use headphones for long-haul flights and the measured frequency response data falls short of matching your lived experience, trust your experience — Bose's tuning is a deliberate optimization for the traveler's core use case.

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 Is the Definitive Answer for Users Who Prefer to Forget About Charging
highlights.body: 60 hours of battery life changes headphone behavior in a way that 24-30 hours leaves untouched. At 60 hours, you stop thinking about charging. You use headphones the way you use a jacket, you put them on when you need them and you ignore their power state. The Sony WH-1000XM6's 30-hour battery is excellent. But 30 hours requires weekly charging. 60 hours requires charging twice a month. This is a fundamental difference that changes the relationship between user and device. For the subset of users for whom cognitive overhead is the primary irritant in their headphone experience, Momentum 4 is the superior product.

highlights.title: Soundcore Space Q45 at $100 Is Proof That the ANC Market Has Been Irreversibly Democratized
highlights.body: The Space Q45 has LDAC support (a codec that until recently was reserved for Sony's own products and premium competitors), 50-hour battery (leading every other headphone in this ranking), and measured ANC performance that rivals products costing $200 more. The reason it ranks #5 rather than #1 is sound quality tuning and build material, plastic construction and less refined audio tuning are the real trade-offs. But for users whose primary concern is isolation and battery life rather than audiophile sound, $100 for Space Q45 is genuinely the correct choice over $349 for Sony or Sennheiser.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年降噪耳機的辯論有了明確答案：Sony WH-1000XM6 是有史以來最好的 ANC 耳機，而且差距相當明顯。Tom's Guide 與 Bose QCU 第二代長達六個月的比較得出了明確贏家，What Hi-Fi? 的量測確認 Sony QN3 晶片將平均音量降低了 87%，比 Bose 的 84% 高出三個百分點。在 ANC 耳機的背景下，三個百分點是「很棒」和「最好」之間的差距。

Bose QuietComfort Ultra 第二代守住第二，名副其實——儘管 Sony 的量測更優越，但 Bose 的感知 ANC 強度對某些用戶來說仍然感覺更強。這是合理的心理現實：Bose 的 ANC 配置優先針對旅行者最感壓迫的低頻噪音（飛機引擎、HVAC 系統）。Sony 在頻率上更均勻地分散 ANC。如果你的使用場景特別是乘坐飛機，Bose 對你來說可能感覺更好。

Sennheiser Momentum 4 排第三，是發燒友和電池壽命冠軍。60 小時的電池壽命和 Sony 的 30 小時或 Bose 的 24 小時完全不在同一個量級，這意味著兩趟國際航班之間三次充電週期，而非六次。對於重度旅行者，Sennheiser 的電池優勢具有決定性意義。

Soundcore Space Q45 排第五，繼續是音頻領域最被低估的預算選項。$100 提供 LDAC 支援、50 小時電池和有效 ANC，這個組合在 2024 年難以達成，在 2026 年已成標準。中國音頻製造商已大幅縮小差距。

highlights.title: Sony WH-1000XM6 是有史以來最好的 ANC 耳機，六個月真實測試的數據毫無歧義
highlights.body: Tom's Guide 的長期比較是我們見過的最嚴格的 ANC 耳機比較：在飛機航班、地鐵通勤、咖啡廳和開放式辦公室中每天使用六個月。Sony QN3 晶片在量測降噪（87% 平均音量降低 vs Bose 的 84%）、LDAC 音質、多點連接和 30 小時電池壽命方面全面勝出。Bose 在某些耳型的感知舒適度和對飛機頻率的調音上勝出。整體而言，Sony 決定性地贏得了整體比較。如果你要在 2026 年購買一款高端 ANC 耳機，WH-1000XM6 是正確選擇。

highlights.title: Sennheiser Momentum 4 是常常忘記充電的用戶唯一正確的答案
highlights.body: 60 小時的電池壽命以 24-30 小時無法做到的方式改變了耳機使用行為。60 小時讓你停止思考充電問題。你使用耳機的方式就像使用外套，需要時就戴上，不監控電量狀態。Sony WH-1000XM6 的 30 小時電池很出色，但 30 小時需要每週充電。60 小時需要每月充電兩次。這不是邊際差異；它從根本上改變了用戶和設備之間的關係。對於認知開銷是耳機體驗主要困擾的用戶，Momentum 4 是更優越的產品。

highlights.title: $100 的 Soundcore Space Q45 是 ANC 市場已被不可逆轉地民主化的證明
highlights.body: Space Q45 擁有 LDAC 支援（直到最近還是 Sony 自家產品和高端競品的專屬編解碼器）、50 小時電池（超過這份排名中的其他所有耳機）和可媲美售價貴 $200 產品的量測 ANC 性能。它排第五而非第一的原因是音色調音和建構材料，塑料機身和較不精細的音頻調音是真正的取捨。但對主要關注隔音和電池壽命而非發燒友音質的用戶，$100 的 Space Q45 確實是 $349 的 Sony 或 Sennheiser 之上的正確選擇。
